items.title: Cameroon separatists to pause fighting ahead of Pope visit
items.dek: The separatists say their decison reflects responsibility, restraint and respect for human dignity.
items.body: The separatists say their decison reflects responsibility, restraint and respect for human dignity.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: French woman, 86, held by ICE after moving to US to reunite with long-lost love
items.dek: The son of pensioner Marie-Thérèse told French media he is worried for his mother's frail health as she is detained in a Louisiana ICE centre.
items.body: The son of pensioner Marie-Thérèse told French media he is worried for his mother's frail health as she is detained in a Louisiana ICE centre.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Sixteen injured after ex-student opens fire at high school in Turkey
items.dek: Students and teachers are among those who were injured in the attack in the country's south-east.
items.body: Students and teachers are among those who were injured in the attack in the country's south-east.
items.author: IriLine Desk
